creator: patrick@cookie.monster.org
text:
I have usb keyboard with and integrated mouse.

ums0 sees the mouse, but not the buttons.

Excerpt from the boot log:

ukbd0: JME Co., Ltd. USB Wireless Controller, rev 1.10/1.00, addr 3, iclass 3/1
kbd2 at ukbd0
ums0: JME Co., Ltd. USB Wireless Controller, rev 1.10/1.00, addr 3, iclass 3/1
ums0: 0 buttons.
